visualization.title: Total Scholarship Amounts per Academic Year

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT
  academic_year AS academic_year,
  SUM(amount) AS total_scholarship_amount
FROM public.scholarships
WHERE amount IS NOT NULL
  AND academic_year IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY academic_year
ORDER BY academic_year ASC;

issues: metadata.rowCount is 4 but sample array contains only 2 rows — metadata inconsistency.
academic_year is encoded as type 'ordinal' (acceptable given academic_year is a textual label); if academic_year were a true date/range, use a temporal axis instead.

SQL orders by academic_year ASC; if academic_year strings do not sort chronologically (e.g., mixed formats), the displayed order may be lexicographic rather than chronological — consider explicit parsing or a custom sort if chronological order matters.
Tooltip formats values as currency ($,.2f) while the SQL returns numeric totals (this is a presentational choice, not a data error).

visualization.title: Total Scholarship Amounts per Academic Year

result.sql:
SELECT
  academic_year AS academic_year,
  SUM(amount) AS total_scholarship_amount
FROM public.scholarships
WHERE amount IS NOT NULL
  AND academic_year IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY academic_year
ORDER BY academic_year ASC;

issues: metadata.rowCount is 4 but sample array contains only 2 rows — metadata inconsistency.
academic_year is encoded as type 'ordinal' (acceptable given academic_year is a textual label); if academic_year were a true date/range, use a temporal axis instead.

SQL orders by academic_year ASC; if academic_year strings do not sort chronologically (e.g., mixed formats), the displayed order may be lexicographic rather than chronological — consider explicit parsing or a custom sort if chronological order matters.
Tooltip formats values as currency ($,.2f) while the SQL returns numeric totals (this is a presentational choice, not a data error).
